title: dryopteris dilatata subsp. remotiloba
intro: Dryopteris dilatata subsp. remotiloba, also known as the broad buckler fern, is a subspecies of fern native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris dilatata subsp. remotiloba include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antacid. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions.
